name: Blueberry Cream Cheese Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
STREUSEL:
1/2 cup unsalted butter -- softened
1 cup sugar
2/3 cup flour
1 1/2 teaspoons cinnamon
1/4 teaspoon salt
BATTER:
1/2 cup unsalted butter -- softened
1 1/4 cups sugar
2 large eggs
2 teaspoons vanilla extract
4 cups flour
4 teaspoons baking powder
1 teaspoon salt
1 cup milk
3 cups fresh blueberries -- picked over
OVEN: 375
1. Butter a 13 x 9-inch baking dish. (Do not use metal.)
2. FILLING: In mixer bowl, beat together cream cheese and sugar. Add egg, lemon juice and vanilla and beat until smooth.
3. STREUSEL: In a small bowl, blend together streusel ingredients until crumbly.
4. BATTER: In another bowl with mixer, beat together butter and sugar. Beat in eggs, 1 at a time and add vanilla. Beat on high speed until light and fluffy. In another bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder and salt. In batches, slowly beat into butter mixture alternately with milk. Fold in blueberries gently, but thoroughly.
5. TO ASSEMBLE CAKE: Spread 2 -1/2 cups batter in bottom of baking dish and spread filling evenly on top. Drop spoonfuls of remaining batter on filling and spread evenly. (Be careful not to mix layers.) Sprinkle streusel evenly over batter.
6. Bake coffeecake in middle of oven for 65 minutes, or until golden and tester comes out clean.
7. Cool completely in baking dish on wire rack.
